verses.text: At that time Michael, 'the great prince,' shall stand up; there shall be unequalled trouble, yet God's people, written in the book, shall be delivered. Guarded in the storm. The worst hour cannot lose those whose names God has written.

'Many of them that sleep in the dust... shall awake, some to everlasting life, and some to... contempt'; and the wise 'shall shine as... the stars for ever.' Resurrection sure. The grave is not the end; the faithful rise to unfading glory.

'Many of them that sleep in the dust... shall awake, some to everlasting life, and some to... contempt'; and the wise 'shall shine as... the stars for ever.' Resurrection sure. The grave is not the end; the faithful rise to unfading glory.
Shut up and seal the book till the time of the end, when 'many shall run to and fro, and knowledge shall be increased.' Sealed for a season. God's full meaning is unfolded in His own time.
Two others stand by the river; when one asks, 'How long?' the man in linen swears it shall be 'a time, times, and an half.' A measured trial. Even the end's troubles are bounded by God's appointment.
Two others stand by the river; when one asks, 'How long?' the man in linen swears it shall be 'a time, times, and an half.' A measured trial. Even the end's troubles are bounded by God's appointment.
Two others stand by the river; when one asks, 'How long?' the man in linen swears it shall be 'a time, times, and an half.' A measured trial. Even the end's troubles are bounded by God's appointment.
Daniel hears but understands not, and asks the end; he is told the words are 'closed up... till the time of the end.' Content to wait. Not all is given us to know; some things we leave with God.
Daniel hears but understands not, and asks the end; he is told the words are 'closed up... till the time of the end.' Content to wait. Not all is given us to know; some things we leave with God.
Many shall be purified and tried, but the wicked do wickedly and understand not; 'the wise shall understand.' A great divide. Affliction refines the godly and hardens the rebel.
From the taking away of the daily sacrifice are appointed days; 'blessed is he that waiteth' and reaches them. Patient endurance. The promise is to those who hold out to the end.
From the taking away of the daily sacrifice are appointed days; 'blessed is he that waiteth' and reaches them. Patient endurance. The promise is to those who hold out to the end.
'Go thou thy way till the end be: for thou shalt rest, and stand in thy lot at the end of the days.' Daniel's hope. The faithful servant shall rest in death and rise to his reward.
